evals.prompt: Create a hook that blocks commits containing TODO comments in production code
evals.expected_output: A preToolUse .sh script that reads toolName/toolArgs from stdin JSON, checks for TODO patterns, and outputs deny JSON when found
expectations: Reads JSON from stdin using jq
Outputs valid deny JSON with permissionDecision and permissionDecisionReason
Handles edge cases (empty input, non-edit tools)

evals.prompt: Create a hook that prevents API keys from being committed to the repository
evals.expected_output: A preToolUse script based on secret-detector.sh template with API key regex patterns
expectations: Reads secret-detector.sh from references/ as starting template
Includes common API key patterns (AWS, GCP, GitHub, etc.)
Tests against sample content to verify detection

evals.prompt: Set up coding standards enforcement for a Python Django project that should not use print(), wildcard imports, or bare except
evals.expected_output: A customized enforce-coding-standards.sh with Python rules and ruff integration
expectations: Reads enforce-coding-standards.sh from references/ as starting template
Adds regex rules for print(), 'from x import *', and bare except
Removes or comments out JavaScript-specific rules

evals.prompt: Create a TDD pipeline enforcement hook with 3 phases: tests, review, and final verification
expectations: Reads enforce-tdd-pipeline.sh from references/ as starting template
Configures PHASES array with 3 phases instead of 5
Keeps content validation, freshness check, and git SHA linking
Removes unused validator functions for phases not in the pipeline
